title: Winterthur, Zurich — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Winterthur, Zurich: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Winterthur is a city in Zurich with a population of 114,000. A charming city near Zurich known for its Technical University, extensive museums including the Technorama science center, and a beautifully preserved old town.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
